title: Salutem Medical Center
content: Salutem Medical Center is a multidisciplinary European-level facility in Vinnytsia. We have combined advanced technologies and the principles of evidence-based medicine (WHO) to provide every patient with accurate diagnostics and effective treatment. Our expert-class equipment allows us to detect the smallest pathologies at early stages, while an individual approach and sincere care help our patients feel confident and comfortable on the path to recovery.

title: Diagnostic Capabilities
content: At Salutem, your safety and the accuracy of results are our priority. We conduct ultrasound examinations on expert-class machines, which guarantees maximum detail and reliability. Outpatient surgery, laboratory diagnostics, and pregnancy support are also available. Every procedure is performed in compliance with the highest quality standards, because we know: a correct diagnosis is the first and most important step towards health.

title: Maryanovych-Grebenyuk Roksolana Yuriyivna
content: Roksolana Yuriyivna is an experienced gastroenterologist specializing in the treatment of gastrointestinal diseases. She will help you understand the causes of discomfort, stomach pain, or digestive disorders. Thanks to the professionalism and empathy of Roksolana Yuriyivna, patients receive not only effective treatment but also peace of mind and support, which is so important for recovery.

title: Morozovska Svitlana Serhiyivna
content: Svitlana Serhiyivna is a gastroenterologist with over 15 years of experience. Her enormous practical experience allows her to successfully solve even the most complex GI problems. Svitlana Serhiyivna constantly improves her methods, relying on the latest research to offer you the most effective and safe path to digestive system health.

title: Nyzkoshapka Oksana Pavlivna
content: Oksana Pavlivna is a gastroenterologist of the highest qualification category with over 15 years of experience. A specialist who combines deep academic knowledge with a sincere desire to help everyone. Oksana Pavlivna masterfully diagnoses and treats gastritis, ulcers, cholecystitis, and other pathologies, providing patients with tangible relief and a lasting result thanks to individually selected therapy.

title: Initial consultation with a gastroenterologist
content: Your first step to healthy digestion. Includes a detailed analysis of complaints, an examination by a specialist, and the development of an individual diagnostic plan (fibrogastroscopy, ultrasound, DNA tests). Our doctors will listen to you carefully and help find the true cause of the ailment so that you feel light again after eating.

title: Follow-up consultation with a gastroenterologist
content: An important stage for monitoring your condition. The doctor will analyze the results of the examinations, evaluate the recovery dynamics, and, if necessary, adjust the treatment. This is a guarantee that the therapy is working exactly as your body needs.

title: Initial online consultation with a gastroenterologist
content: Qualified gastroenterologist assistance wherever you are. The online format allows you to discuss your symptoms, get professional recommendations, and a preliminary action plan without the need to spend time on the road. Convenient, fast, and just as expert as in the clinic office.

title: Follow-up online consultation with a gastroenterologist
content: A convenient way to discuss test results and evaluate the results of initial treatment. The doctor will provide explanations and adjust the intake of medications, staying in touch with you for your peace of mind and confidence in the result.

title: Initial consultation with a pediatric gastroenterologist
content: Caring diagnostics for the youngest patients. Our pediatric gastroenterologists know how to find an approach to a child and gently identify the causes of digestive problems. Treatment of hepatitis, gastritis, and infections is carried out with special attention to the child's body.

title: Follow-up consultation with a pediatric gastroenterologist
content: Monitoring the child's health at the recovery stage. We analyze test results and adapt treatment for the best outcome, so that your little one is cheerful and active again.
